question: How to apply for admission at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET Admission Process: 1. Appear in JEE Main for B.Tech admission, 2. Apply through UKTECH counselling at www.uktech.ac.in, 3. Required documents: 10th and 12th marksheet, JEE scorecard, Photo ID, 6 passport photos, Transfer certificate, Character certificate, Category certificate if applicable. 4. Pay fees through SBI Collect portal. For further info Please visit: https://gbpiet.ac.in/admission/ or call 01368-228030

question: What is the admission process for B.Tech at GBPIET?
answer: B.Tech Admission at GBPIET: Entrance exam: JEE Main. Counselling through Uttarakhand Technical University (UKTECH). Available branches with 60 seats each: CSE, CSE AI and ML, ECE, Mechanical, Manufacturing, Electrical, Civil, Biotechnology.For further details Please Visit: https://gbpiet.ac.in/admission/

question: What is the admission process for M.Tech at GBPIET?
answer: M.Tech Admission at GBPIET: Entrance exam: GATE. Counselling processed directly by the college. Available M.Tech programs: CSE (18 seats), Digital Signal Processing (10 seats), Biotechnology (25 seats), Production Engineering (18 seats), Thermal Engineering (18 seats), Geotechnology (18 seats), Infrastructure (18 seats). Eligibility: Bachelor degree with minimum 50% marks.

question: What is the admission process for MCA at GBPIET?
answer: MCA Admission at GBPIET: Entrance exam: Conducted by VMSB Uttarakhand Technical University, Dehradun. Total seats: 60. HOD of CSA/MCA: Prof. Priti Dimri. For further details Please visit: https://gbpiet.ac.in/admission/

question: What is the admission process for PhD at GBPIET?
answer: PhD Admission at GBPIET: Selection through written exam and interview conducted by the college. Available in CSE, ECE, and Biotechnology. Total intake: approximately 60 students.

question: What documents are required for admission at GBPIET?
answer: Documents required: 10th and 12th marksheet, JEE Main scorecard, Photo ID (Aadhar/Passport), 6 passport photos, Transfer certificate, Character certificate, Category certificate if applicable (SC/ST/OBC).

question: What is the eligibility for B.Tech at GBPIET?
answer: B.Tech eligibility at GBPIET: Must have passed 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics. Must appear in JEE Main. Admission through UKTECH State counselling. For further details Please Visit: www.uktech.ac.in

question: What is the eligibility for MCA at GBPIET?
answer: MCA eligibility at GBPIET: Bachelor degree in BCA, B.Sc (Computer Science/IT/Mathematics), or B.Tech. Must appear in UTUEE exam. Minimum 50% marks in qualifying examination.

question: What is the admission process for B.Tech Lateral Entry at GBPIET?
answer: Admission to the second year of B.Tech (Lateral Entry) at GBPIET is based on merit, subject to the minimum eligibility criteria mentioned in the admission brochure.

question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Tech Lateral Entry at GBPIET?
answer: Eligibility for B.Tech Lateral Entry at GBPIET: Option 1: Candidates must have passed a minimum three-year Diploma examination (or two-year Diploma for lateral entry) with at least 45% marks (40% for reserved category) in any branch of Engineering and Technology. OR Option 2: Candidates must have a B.Sc. degree from a recognized University with at least 45% marks (40% for reserved category) and should have passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.

question: Can Diploma students get direct second year admission in B.Tech at GBPIET?
answer: Yes, Diploma holders can get direct admission into the second year of B.Tech at GBPIET through Lateral Entry, subject to merit and eligibility criteria.

question: Can B.Sc students apply for B.Tech Lateral Entry at GBPIET?
answer: Yes, B.Sc. graduates from a recognized University with at least 45% marks (40% for reserved category) and Mathematics in 10+2 can apply for B.Tech Lateral Entry at GBPIET.

question: What is the admission process for M.Tech at GBPIET?
answer: Admission to M.Tech programmes at GBPIET is conducted through GATE. Admission and counselling for M.Tech courses are processed directly by the college.

question: How many students are admitted in M.Tech at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET admits nearly 70 students in various M.Tech postgraduate programmes through GATE.

question: What are the M.Tech courses available at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET offers M.Tech programmes in Computer Science and Engineering, Digital Signal Processing, Biotechnology, Production Engineering, Thermal Engineering, Geotechnology, and Infrastructure.

question: How many seats are available in M.Tech CSE at GBPIET?
answer: M.Tech Computer Science and Engineering at GBPIET has 18 seats.

question: How many seats are available in M.Tech Digital Signal Processing at GBPIET?
answer: M.Tech Digital Signal Processing at GBPIET has 10 seats.

question: How many seats are available in M.Tech Biotechnology at GBPIET?
answer: M.Tech Biotechnology at GBPIET has 25 seats.

question: How many seats are available in M.Tech Production Engineering at GBPIET?
answer: M.Tech Production Engineering at GBPIET has 18 seats.

question: How many seats are available in M.Tech Thermal Engineering at GBPIET?
answer: M.Tech Thermal Engineering at GBPIET has 18 seats.

question: How many seats are available in M.Tech Geotechnology at GBPIET?
answer: M.Tech Geotechnology at GBPIET has 18 seats.

question: How many seats are available in M.Tech Infrastructure at GBPIET?
answer: M.Tech Infrastructure at GBPIET has 18 seats.

question: What is the eligibility criteria for M.Tech admission at GBPIET?
answer: Candidates applying for M.Tech at GBPIET must have passed a Bachelor’s Degree or equivalent in the relevant field with at least 50% marks (45% marks for reserved category candidates).
